summary: Tested all 6 newly-implemented CakJek features end-to-end (backend pytest 11/11 + Playwright UI). Service toggles (GET/PUT), Banner desc+link, Admin creds change/revert, Kost & Rent CRUD with daily/weekly/monthly + with_driver pricing, Home shows 'Rp 0' + 2x4 grid + promo nav, Admin login back button, Admin Services toggle persists to home with Coming Soon badge, Banner form has Description + Link inputs and persists to /promo, Credentials card present on settings. All passing.

issues: Sidebar appears as a full-width overlay that covers admin content when viewport is mobile-sized. The Banner edit modal opens correctly but is partially obscured by the open sidebar on narrow viewports (works fine on tablet/desktop). Not blocking — admin is desktop-first.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 747 lines — getting close to the 700-line threshold; consider splitting into routers (admin.py, public.py, models.py) for maintainability.
Auth uses an in-memory `_active_tokens` set — tokens are lost on backend restart and cannot scale across workers. Acceptable for MVP but should be persisted (e.g. JWT or Redis) before production.
Admin creds endpoint stores password in plaintext in MongoDB (db.admin_creds). Should be bcrypt-hashed even for a simple admin.
GET /admin/services route is missing — only PUT exists; admin UI uses public GET /services which is fine, but if you ever need a 'pending changes' view you'll need an admin-only GET.
Banner GET /banners does not respect order_idx descending vs ascending consistently for promo page vs carousel (currently asc, which seems correct).
Service toggles default fallback works correctly client-side (`toggles[s.key] !== false` defaults to enabled), good resilience for first-load.
test_credentials: admin / admin (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Tests automatically revert after credential-change test.
seed_data_creation: Test banner created and deleted within tests. Test kost/rent created and deleted within tests. Service toggles restored to all-true after toggling.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py (11 tests, all green). Existing /app/backend/tests likely has earlier suites — check before re-running. All test data uses TEST_ prefix and self-cleans. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var or pass explicitly; tests connect to public preview URL by default.
